response.global_analysis: The video features a medley of two songs. 1. 'Beautiful World (2024 Mix)' performed by Aki Rosenthal. The audio begins mid-phrase compared to the reference JSON, skipping the intro. I am only transcribing what is actively sung. 2. '桜のあと(all quartets lead to the?)' performed by Shirakami Fubuki. The reference JSON provided only a small snippet of lyrics; I have transcribed the full performance based on the audio and on-screen text, ensuring tight alignment with the fast-paced delivery. All timestamps strictly follow vocal cues.
